description: MCP tools required by aethis-skills. Keep in sync with aethis-mcp tool registrations.

aethis_decide.description: Evaluate eligibility against a published rule bundle

aethis_schema.description: Get input fields required for an eligibility check

aethis_next_question.description: Get optimal next question for conversational eligibility

aethis_list_projects.description: List all projects in the current tenant

aethis_list_bundles.description: List rule bundles for a project with version history

aethis_project_status.description: Check status of a project and its latest generation job

aethis_create_bundle.description: Create a rule bundle with source text and test cases (TDD)

aethis_discover_fields.description: Extract input fields from source text before writing tests

aethis_refine_fields.description: Improve field discovery with targeted feedback

aethis_add_guidance.description: Add domain knowledge not in the source text

aethis_generate.description: Trigger async rule generation (poll with aethis_project_status)

aethis_generate_and_test.description: Generate rules and run all tests (60-120s, blocking)

aethis_refine.description: Add guidance then regenerate and test in one call

aethis_publish.description: Publish latest bundle (validates tests pass first)

aethis_list_tests.description: List all test cases for a project

aethis_get_test.description: Get a single test case by ID

aethis_archive_project.description: Archive a project (preserved but hidden from listing)

aethis_archive_bundle.description: Archive a bundle (preserved but excluded from decide)
